title: crepis arenaria
intro: Crepis arenaria, also known as lesser hawk's beard or dandelion hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat liver and kidney issues due to its diuretic and purgative effects. The health benefits of Crepis arenaria include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the body's detoxification process. Crepis arenaria can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
